description_long: This is a rectangular, cream-colored milk carton with a red front and side panels, featuring bold, hand-drawn yellow and white text. The front panel displays the words 'POWER MILK' and includes production and best-before dates written in a casual, handwritten style. The top of the carton is folded into a classic gable-top shape, with a small spout at the peak for pouring. One side of the carton shows a stylized white handprint on a red background, while the other side repeats the product name and date information. The carton appears to be made of coated paperboard, typical for beverage containers, and is designed to be lightweight and portable. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the surface has a matte, slightly rough finish.
description: A cream and red rectangular milk carton labeled 'POWER MILK' with handwritten dates and a handprint graphic, featuring a classic gable-top spout.
description_view_0: Front view shows 'MILK', production and best-before dates, and 'POWER MILK' in yellow and white on a red panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large 'POWER MILK' text and red stripes at the base, with the gable-top spout visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side displays a white handprint on a red background with 'MILK' written at the top.
description_view_3: Back view repeats the 'POWER MILK' text and red stripes, with the gable-top spout centered.
attribute_label_or_branding: Handwritten-style yellow and white text reading 'POWER MILK', 'MILK', production and best-before dates, and a white handprint graphic on red panels.
